content:
Character: Isabella Vale
Perception: Isabella is genuinely lovely — tall, composed, those grey-green eyes that seem to be calculating something gentle. She dresses simply but everything fits too well, and her hands have never seen manual labor — small details I can't stop noticing. She's warm, asks good questions, remembers what I've said weeks later. We meet at the coffee shop most Thursdays and it's become something I look forward to, which worries me because I don't collect people easily. I think she sees me as a friend, maybe her closest one here. I know she works for some foundation. I suspect she's hiding something significant — not malicious, but significant. I haven't pushed.
